---
title: "The Very Rev. George David Boyle"
---

## The Very Rev. George David Boyle

**Dates:** (17 May 1828-21 March 1901)

### Description

Dean of Salisbury

### Biography

He married (1861) Mary Christiana Robins.  He served as Vicar of Handsworth from 1860, then became Vicar of Kidderminster in 1867, then Dean of Salisbury in 1880.

### Letters

- Letter from  [August 1893]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
